---
title: "Have you heard of Depth in Data??????"
author:  "[Matthew Lee](https://github.com/mattlee821) at the [University of Bristol](https://research-information.bristol.ac.uk/en/persons/matthew-lee(185b3727-7dbd-473e-8739-64707af1d160).html), 2019-03-06"
output:
  html_document:
    fig_width: 1
---

----

# One Ring to rule them all, One Ring to find them,
# One Ring to bring them all and in the darkness bind them
